sqlCommand.descr: delete from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Amt1 = 0
Update TransX set Amt1 = -Amt1 where KeyID = '[batchID]'
Update x set x.GLdesc = y.Descr from TransX x inner join COA y on x.GL = y.GL where KeyID = '[batchID]'
Update x set x.CCdesc = y.Descr from TransX x inner join CCtrs y on x.Contract = y.CCtr where KeyID = '[batchID]'

sqlSelect.descr: insert into TransX (KeyID, Period, GL,Contract,Amt1) values ('[batchID]',[mm],
